offer: For small accounting firms processing 5–15 invoices/month, inefficient document retrieval causes late payments and client dissatisfaction. We provide a digitization and search tool instead of manual filing and searching through physical documents.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for small accounting firms
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to small accounting firms with demo video
Engage in community forums for accounting tools
try_it: Let users try keyword search and document categorization on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Make a demo video of the manual-first workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
Enable one-click export of simple reports
Reduce steps in the onboarding process
